title: nephelochloa altaica
intro: Nephelochloa altaica, also known as Schizonepeta, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Nephelochloa altaica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically dried and processed into teas, capsules, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
